  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process 'payload.exe' is not a standard Windows binary and was executed from the Downloads folder. It performs multiple registry modifications, including creating keys and setting values, potentially for persistence or to alter system security settings related to SCHANNEL.",

    "unusual process name",
    "execution from Downloads folder",
    "registry modification for persistence",
    "registry modification related to SCHANNEL",
    "network communication capabilities (wininet, ws2_32, winhttp)",
    "cryptographic capabilities (crypt32, schannel)"
  ]
